wine_tours.name: Ribera del Duero Like a Native
tour_types: Lechazo lamb and wine pairing tours
wine_tours.duration: Full day (8-10 hours) or half day
wine_tours.operator: Ribera del Duero Like a Native
wine_tours.description: Local boutique tour operator based in Aranda de Duero. Tours include traditional family wineries, vineyard walks with enologists, medieval Aranda or Penafiel lunch with lechazo, and visits to 14th-century underground cellars. Over 275 five-star TripAdvisor reviews; customised itineraries for wine enthusiasts, gastronomy lovers and active travellers.

wine_tours.name: Aranda de Duero Underground Wine Cellar Tour
wine_tours.address: C/ Isilla s/n, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_tours.operator: Civitatis / Aranda de Duero Tourist Office
wine_tours.description: Official guided tour of two of the 135 medieval cave cellars under the old town of Aranda de Duero. Caverns date to the 12th-18th centuries; 5-mile subterranean network runs 24-33 feet below street level. Tour ends with two glasses of DO Ribera del Duero Crianza paired with cured goat cheese.

wine_tours.name: Penafiel Castle and Provincial Wine Museum Guided Tour
wine_tours.address: Museo del Vino, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
tour_types: Castle and wine museum guided tour
Wine tasting in museum tasting room
wine_tours.operator: Museo Provincial del Vino de Valladolid / Diputacion de Valladolid
wine_tours.description: Combined visit to the 15th-century Penafiel Castle and the Provincial Wine Museum housed within it. Museum designed by architect Roberto Valle Gonzalez covers three floors of winemaking, ethnographic and historical exhibits. Ground floor tasting room offers guided samplings of DO Ribera del Duero wines; free shuttle from town centre at weekends.

verified.address_quoted: Museo del Vino, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain

wine_tours.name: Finca Villacreces Golden Mile E-Bike Tour
wine_tours.address: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
tour_types: 4.5 km guided e-bike tour around the estate and Duero riverbank
wine_tours.description: Estate e-bike tour through the 115-hectare Finca Villacreces property in organic viticulture since 2017. The 4.5 km route along the Duero river discovers soil differences across the estate; route runs past Vega Sicilia's neighbouring vines and through bicentennial pines. Post-ride tasting of Pruno and Finca Villacreces wines.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Espana

wine_tours.name: Pago de Carraovejas 6 Senses Wine and Vineyard Tour
wine_tours.address: Camino de Carraovejas s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_tours.description: One of Ribera del Duero's leading wine tourism programmes at the Pago de Carraovejas estate in Penafiel. The 6 Senses experience covers six stages from vineyard to barrel room; the extended version pairs each stage with dishes from the one-Michelin-star Ambivium kitchen. Launched 2013.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de Carraovejas, s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Espana

wine_tours.name: Finca Torremilanos Winery Tour and Tasting
wine_tours.address: Nacional 122 Km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_tours.description: Guided winery tour at Finca Torremilanos, one of the founding estates of the DO Ribera del Duero in Aranda de Duero. The estate practises biodynamic viticulture. Tour covers the historic 19th-century winery buildings, the modern production and barrel cellar, followed by a tasting of three wines from the Torremilanos range.

verified.address_quoted: Nacional 122, km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos

wine_tours.name: Dominio Lubiano Golden Mile Viewpoint Tour
wine_tours.address: Ctr Pesquera-Valbuena Polig 9 Parc 66, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_tours.description: Personable small-group tour at the Dominio Lubiano family winery on the Golden Mile. Tour ends at the panoramic viewpoint above the Duero valley, with the 18th-century hermitage and 12th-century Cistercian Valbuena monastery in view. Led by co-owner and winemaker Monica; includes three wines with aperitif.

verified.address_quoted: CTR PESQUERA - VALBUENA POLG 9 PARC.66, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

wine_tours.name: Bodegas Legaris Barrel to Senses Tour
wine_tours.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_tours.description: Two complementary tour formats at Bodegas Legaris in Curiel de Duero. The classic tour covers vineyard, winery and barrel cellar with a three-wine flight; the Barrel to Senses experience adds blending theory and practical single-barrel comparative tastings for groups of 6-30.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva, Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid
